violations.text: Eggs are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. The consumer advisory provided shall also disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Per PIC, establishment will reprint menus with proper consumer advisory statement. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

Raw tuna was observed thawed in its original reduced oxygen packaging (ROP) in the walk-in cooler. Seafood items that are packaged in ROP packaging shall be completely removed from their packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food items were observed held at 42 degrees Fahrenheit and were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Proper thawing methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity at the inside bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The cutting boards on the kitchen prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2025
The condensate from the beer draft refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2025
Allergen advisory statement is not present on menus or order point. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024
The handwashing sink at the bar was lacking soap, paper towels, and proper signage. Handwashing aids were placed at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024

Vacuum packaged raw tuna was observed thawing in the walk-in cooler at 40 degrees Fahrenheit with the packaging still intact. Reduced oxygen packaged fish must be removed from the packaging prior to thawing. PIC informed. Raw tuna was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024

The cutting boards on the cookline attached to prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
The food prep sink in the kitchen and the ice bin at the bar are lacking adequate air gaps. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
The condensate from the espresso machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
The door to the staff toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

The ceiling, walls and curtain in walk-in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice and frost. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Per PIC, new gaskets for walk-in freezer are on order. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
